compiled_state.title: Wire 5-stage chain integration: ensure depth-agnostic reads and event_id chain links pass end-to-end
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Overview
Make T11's 7 integration tests pass end-to-end. This task verifies the full preconditions chain works: brainstorm→preplanning→impl-plan→sprint→commit→epic-closure with depth-agnostic event reads and valid cross-stage event_id references. Primarily a wiring verification task — if preconditions-validator-lib.sh (T2) and Story 1's writer/reader helpers are correctly implemented, this task may involve only minor fixture adjustments.

## File Impact
- Modify (if needed): tests/integration/test-preconditions-chain-5stage.sh (fixture adjustments, helper imports)
- Modify (if needed): plugins/dso/hooks/lib/preconditions-validator-lib.sh (integration gaps found during T11 execution)

## Implementation Notes
This task should NOT introduce new logic. If the chain doesn't wire correctly, the root cause is either:
1. Story 1's _read_latest_preconditions / writer helpers have a gap — fix in preconditions-validator-lib.sh (T2 was built against stubs; update for actual Story 1 API)
2. The test fixtures don't match the actual PRECONDITIONS schema — fix the fixtures

The test_chain_depth_agnostic_standard_tier_read case is the key depth-agnostic gate: confirm that standard-tier events (with extra fields) are silently accepted by entry checks that only validate minimal-tier fields.

The test_chain_event_id_links_form_valid_chain case validates SC11: each stage's emitted PRECONDITIONS contains an upstream_event_id that equals the prior stage's event UUID.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All 7 tests from T11 PASS
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/integration/test-preconditions-chain-5stage.sh 2>&1 | grep -c "PASS" | awk '{exit ($1 < 7)}'
- [ ] test_chain_depth_agnostic_standard_tier_read specifically passes (depth-agnostic contract verified)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/integration/test-preconditions-chain-5stage.sh 2>&1 | grep "test_chain_depth_agnostic_standard_tier_read" | grep -q PASS
- [ ] test_chain_event_id_links_form_valid_chain passes (SC11 cross-stage chain verified)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/integration/test-preconditions-chain-5stage.sh 2>&1 | grep "test_chain_event_id_links_form_valid_chain" | grep -q PASS
- [ ] No new interactive prompts introduced
  Verify: ! grep -q 'read -p\|/dev/tty' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/hooks/lib/preconditions-validator-lib.sh
- [ ] validate.sh --ci passes
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh --ci

## Retry Budget
MAX_ATTEMPTS: 3 (sonnet model)
On 3 consecutive sonnet failures: escalate to opus with full diagnostic context
On 3 consecutive opus failures (6 total): escalate to user
If MAX_AGENTS: 0 at sonnet→opus escalation time: skip opus step, escalate to user immediately
